title: atriplex hastata subsp. oppositifolia
intro: Atriplex hastata subsp. oppositifolia, also known as the opposite-leaved orpiment plant, is a subspecies of the Atriplex hastata plant, which is a type of shrub or small tree belonging to the amaranth family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Atriplex hastata subsp. oppositifolia include treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent to extract its medicinal compounds.
